name: Product Governance Aligned
description: AI-driven distribution aligns the products distributed to their identified target market (product governance).
rationale: ESMA ¶20: AI systems must be designed and monitored, for example in the context of product governance, to align the distribution of products to the target market.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
